ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1 = Male, 2 = Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "narrow_pitch_range" INTEGER /* Narrow pitch range (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "decreased_volume" INTEGER /* Decreased volume (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "fatigue" INTEGER /* Fatigue (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "dryness" INTEGER /* Dryness (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "lumping" INTEGER /* Lumping (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "heartburn" INTEGER /* Heartburn (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "choking" INTEGER /* Choking (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "eye_dryness" INTEGER /* Eye dryness (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient experiencing the symptoms */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of symptoms (1-5) */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date of symptom onset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Diabetes (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Hypertension (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "cad" INTEGER /* CAD (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "head_and_neck_cancer" INTEGER /* Head and Neck Cancer (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "head_injury" INTEGER /* Head Injury (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "cva" INTEGER /* CVA (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status (e.g., 'Ongoing', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor */,
  "smoking" INTEGER /* Smoking (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "ppd" REAL /* PPD (packs per day) */,
  "drinking" INTEGER /* Drinking (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of drinking */,
  "diurnal_pattern" INTEGER /* Diurnal pattern (1-5) */,
  "onset_of_dysphonia" INTEGER /* Onset of dysphonia (1-5) */,
  "noise_at_work" INTEGER /* Noise at work (1-5) */,
  "occupational_vocal_demand" INTEGER /* Occupational vocal demand (1-5) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the lifestyle factor */,
  "smoking_history" TEXT /* Detailed smoking history */,
  "drinking_history" TEXT /* Detailed drinking history */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocal_health_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocal health assessment */,
  "vhi_10" INTEGER /* VHI-10 score */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocal_health_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "severity_improvement" INTEGER /* Severity of improvement (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., 'Active', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_studies" (
  "patient_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-study participation */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of study participation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the patient in the study (e.g., 'Participant', 'Control') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_studies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_data" (
  "study_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data collected for the study */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., 'Vocal Health', 'Treatment Efficacy') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
